hero.summary: I lead frontend architecture and delivery in a 60+ person logistics program across 3 product portals. I built Micro Frontend with Nx (host + remotes) and standardized delivery through Docker/Kubernetes CI/CD. 8+ years with Angular and React/Next.js, focused on scalability, performance, and faster shipping.

impact.label: Impact
impact.title: Evidence of scale and ownership
impact.description: Concrete metrics from architecture and leadership work.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Professional journey
experience.description: 8+ years growing teams, shipping products, and shaping frontend architecture.

projects.label: Case studies
projects.title: Work that reflects how I build
projects.description: Problem, solution, and impact across enterprise and product teams.

vela-logistics.problem: Need a scalable, multi-portal logistics platform for internal and external users with independent deployment and tenant isolation.
vela-logistics.solution: Architected Micro Frontend (Nx, host + remotes) for Core, Customer, and Supplier portals; multi-tenant config; CI/CD with Docker and Kubernetes.
vela-logistics.impact: 60+ person program; 3 portals; parallel team development and stable releases.

sogus.problem: Online examination platform requiring flexible test formats and scalable frontend for a 10-person team.
sogus.solution: Led frontend design with Angular and React/Next.js; built flows for creating tests, assigning exams, and reviewing results.
sogus.impact: Unified exam lifecycle; collaboration with stakeholders on requirements and technical solutions.

medbuy.problem: E-commerce for pharmaceutical supply chain with responsive UX and reliable backend integration.
medbuy.solution: Developed responsive UIs in React and Next.js; integrated APIs; containerized deployment with Docker.
medbuy.impact: Improved usability and alignment with UX/UI design; production-ready deployment.

kensa-order.problem: Order and revenue management with Admin and Customer portals and payment integration.
kensa-order.solution: Fullstack order system with Laravel REST APIs; integrated VNPay and Payoo; deployed on Linux with Docker.
kensa-order.impact: End-to-end order processing and reporting; live payment flows.

kilu.problem: Marketplace for used motorbikes with listing, search, and transaction workflows.
kilu.solution: Custom WordPress features, theme and plugin customization; performance and SEO optimization.
kilu.impact: Key pages ranked; marketplace workflows supported.

about.label: About
about.title: Architecture-first, team-first
about.description: My focus is simple: scalable architecture, reliable team delivery, and measurable impact. At VELA, I defined the Micro Frontend strategy with Nx (one host, multiple remotes), built Docker/Kubernetes CI/CD, and led 8 frontend developers in a 60+ person program. I drive clear ownership, reusable components, and performance discipline so multi-portal, multi-tenant products can evolve in parallel without sacrificing quality.

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: A toolbox for modern product teams
skills.description: Breadth across the stack, with a focus on high-quality frontend, design systems, and collaboration.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Open to Frontend Architect and Team Lead opportunities, especially where scale, product ownership, and team growth matter.
